Localization.Description: The desktop wallpaper was changed on behalf of one of the following processes: reg.exe, powershell.exe, powershell_ise.exe, pwsh.exe, rundll32.exe, regsvr32.exe, msiexec.exe, dllhost.exe, wscript.exe. Some cryptolockers, for example, Rhysida, perform similar actions (using reg.exe) and also prevent users from changing the wallpaper containing the attackers' demands.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the desktop wallpaper by changing the registry on host {event_src.host}. This may indicate cryptolocker activity.
